perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a leopard-pattern bucket hat and a white textured top stands in front of a Costco freezer section, holding a large bag of 'Supreme Salmon' fillets and gesturing excitedly. (2) The camera shows a series of close-ups of the salmon packaging, focusing on the brand name and flavor descriptions. (3) The setting changes to a modern kitchen where hands are seen using a paper towel to pat dry a salmon fillet on a wire rack. (4) A knife is used to score a cross-hatch pattern into the fish skin, followed by a yellow sauce being squeezed from a packet onto the fillet. (5) Two women are seated at a dining table; one is the woman from the start, and the other wears a black beret. They use forks to taste the cooked salmon and show expressions of approval. (6) A macro shot of the cooked salmon fillet reveals its flaky texture and glistening sauce. (7) The two women hold up individually wrapped portions of the salmon to the camera, smiling and gesturing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, introducing a product. (2) Occasional sound effects like 'dings' and 'pop' noises occur in sync with text overlays. (3) The audio shifts to include a calm, steady male voiceover providing instructions, while the music continues at a consistent volume. (4) Ambient kitchen sounds are audible, including the rustling of paper and the soft thud of a knife against a cutting surface. (5) During the tasting segment, the women are heard making 'mmm' and 'wow' sounds, indicating enjoyment. (6) The video concludes with the male narrator's voice over the final upbeat music track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: The 'Costco Wholesale' logo is displayed at the top of the frame throughout much of the video. (2) Hook Text: '鮭魚菲力 三種組合 1299元' (Salmon Fillet 3-flavor combo 1299 TWD) appears in large white and red characters. (3) Decorative Text: '料理時間' (Cooking Time) appears with a clock graphic during the prep scene. (4) Functional Text: '奶油檸檬醬' (Butter Lemon Sauce) identifies the sauce packet being used. (5) Hook Text: '家庭主婦的好幫手' (Housewife's Good Helper) emphasizes the product's convenience. (6) CTA Text: '216元 你覺得值得嗎' (216 TWD, do you think it's worth it?) appears at the end to encourage comments.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping Discovery -> Step-by-step Cooking -> Tasting Review & Value Proposition

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main females on screen; hands in the kitchen prep scene likely belong to one of them or a cameraman.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a leopard-print bucket hat and a white ruffled blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a Costco warehouse aisle with refrigerated shelves; transitions to a bright, clean kitchen with white countertops and then a home dining area.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright artificial store lighting and warm indoor home lighting.

vocal_qualities.tone: Energetic and enthusiastic (female), Calm and instructional (male)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific 'Supreme Salmon' product available at Costco by demonstrating its value, ease of preparation (using an air fryer/oven), and positive taste profile to potential shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the Costco logo prominently and provides detailed pricing and preparation steps for the specific brand 'Supreme Salmon'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of high-energy female host paired with a calm male instructional narrator.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious but quality-seeking foodies in Taiwan, using the popular Costco 'finds' format.
